feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP, ABAP environment
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP, ABAP environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Identity Directory API not working from RAP & CAP
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a requirement to create Users in SAP BTP whenever the supplier registers with email id. For this SAP has provided Identity Directory API Overview | Identity Directory API | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

In above link I want to use Users.

Below is the destination set up

We are trying to call API from ABAP on Cloud and CAPM but it is failing in both cases below are the details.

From ABAP on Cloud:

 

When trying option 1 and 2 we are getting below error.

"401","detail":"Authentication credentials are invalid or not allowed for this endpoint."

CAPM:

After deploying to cloud foundry we get below error.

 

We get below error.

 

Surprisingly when we try from Postman hub it is working fine.

 Can anyone help?

entry.title: IDOC Extension
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I have a requirement to create extension for SHPMNT05. I have created 2 segments header(4 fields) and item(1 field). . header is added to E1EDT20 and item added to E1EDL20. In FM IDOC_OUTPUT_SHPMNT, created an enhancement to fill the idoc structure for both header and item fields. when triggered from VT02N , only header fields are showing and item structure is blank. status code 26 & 29.

in log of status 26 showing error in program SAPLEDI1 in subroutine FA5_DOCUMENT_SYNTAX_CHECK.

need help on this issue. where am I going wrong. the enhancement in the FM is not getting triggered by breakpoint. only the above routine is triggered at breakpoint but not clear about what is causing issue.

entry.title: How to change the original language of a development object in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

 

Is there a way to change the original language of a development object in Eclipse ADT?

We're working on a s/4hana public cloud project atm and one of our developers has created a package in a certain language, there are lots of objects present in the package, deleting and recreating is not an option. I found below blog in which it's mentioned that this capability is in the backlog. I assume (hope) it has been developed by this point - 3 years later.

ADT/BTP ABAP Environment - How to change original ... - SAP Community

 

Thanks and regards

entry.title: find me a bapi/fm to change the order for iw32 t-code
entry.content:
hello experts.

i want to change the order for iw32 t-code can anyone suggest me a bapi/fm and process to achieve it.

thanks&regards.

vikas.t.

entry.title: Edit button Disabled in Business Configuration app in TEST and PROD system
entry.content:
Hi,
As per the tutorial provided by SAP to create a Business Configuration Application on top of the custom table was created and published successfully in the Customizing and Development tenants of the 3 - System Landscape of SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition.

When the create Business configuration application is opened in the Customizing / Development tenants, the Edit button is enabled and it is possible to add or delete records into the table and save them in a customizing request.

When this BC application is transported to the TEST and PROD systems by releasing the Workbench Transport from Eclipse and the Customizing Transport from the cloud the data and the table are available as expected in the TEST and PROD system.
But the Edit button is disabled in the TEST and PROD system.

As per the reference from the blog https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-to-create-a-rap-bo-to-change-the-content-of-a-customizing-table-in-the/ba-p/13723087 it is clearly mentioned that the TEST and PROD systems are not made for customizing.

How can we make this edit button enabled in TEST and PROD systems? As whenever there is a change in data the user has to make changes in CUST system and capture them in a Customizing Transport and then export that transport to the next systems which in long run is not advisable.

As per the community blog mentioned above, where can we find the setting for adaptable in production to make the changes?

Regards,
Shyam Prasad.

entry.title: ValueHelp with parameters where the value help provider entity is a custom entity with parameters
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am trying to use a valueHelp for which the value help provider entity is a custom entity with parameters for which I will have a class that implements a custom query in an ABAP RAP app. 

Here is my custom entity: 

@EndUserText.label: 'Value Help Entity for Appointment Slots'

@ObjectModel.query.implementedBy: 'ABAP:ZCL_APPOINTMENT_SLOTS_QUERY'

@odata.entityType.name: 'ZVH_HA_APPOIN_SLOTSParameters'

@odata.entitySet.name: 'ZVH_HA_APPOIN_SLOTS'

define custom entity ZVH_HA_APPOIN_SLOTS

with parameters

appointmentDate : zha_date_dats,

doctorId: zha_doctor_id

{

key appointTime: zha_time;

}

 

Here is the valueHelp Annotation:

 

@Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{

entity: {name: 'ZVH_HA_APPOIN_SLOTS', element: 'appointTime'},

additionalBinding: [

{ parameter:'appointmentDate' , localElement: 'AppointmentDate' },

{ parameter: 'doctorId', localElement:'DoctorId' }

]

}]

AppointmentHour,

 The custom view is exposed in service:

@EndUserText: {

label: 'Service Definition for ZC_HA_APPOIN'

}

@ObjectModel: {

leadingEntity: {

name: 'ZC_HA_APPOIN'

}

}

define service ZUI_HA_APPOIN_O4

provider contracts odata_v4_ui {

expose ZC_HA_APPOIN as Appoint;

expose ZC_HA_APP_MS as AppMS;

expose ZC_HA_DOCUMENTS_APPOIN as Documents;

expose ZVH_HA_APPOIN_SLOTS;

}

When I try to click on the field AppointmentHour in UI (in preview) I get error in the browser console and I get stuck there:

 

2025-03-27 12:27:36.371000 Unknown child ZVH_HA_APPOIN_SLOTSSet of com.sap.gateway.srvd_f4.zvh_ha_appoin_slots.v0001.Container - /ZVH_HA_APPOIN_SLOTSSet/ sap.ui.model.odata.v4.ODataMetaModel

2025-03-27 12:27:36.372000 Inconsistent value help metadata: Entity /ZVH_HA_APPOIN_SLOTSSet is not defined -

2025-03-27 12:27:36.372000 selectedInfo or selectedContent undefined -

 

I do not arrive with the flow in the class : zcl_appointment_slots_query because it stops at this error.

 

I have attached also a screen shot with the error.

 

Would you please help?

 

Thank you

 

Regards

Bogdan

entry.title: Unable to Retrieve Business Data in Custom Inbound API on BO – S/4HANA Cloud 2502 (RAP)
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am trying to create custom inbound API based on TUTORIAL from developers.sap.com. The problem is that i can't get data from my system on Partner Demo Customizing tenant (100) for S4H Cloud Public Edition 2502 to test it. When i try use option Data Preview i got below message. 

Additionally, when i released service binding based on CDS Projection View for I_SupplierInvoiceTP to validate it, the symptoms were the same - table was empty. ...

My activities: 

  • In my opinion i have enough business roles assigned because i have an access to Manage Sales Order application where i can search for created documents. Maybe not enough? - if so, where i can find information about necessary business roles that i need to assign to my account on S4Hana system ?

  • CDS has released contracts C1 and C0.  

  • What's more, in my Partner Demo Development tenant (080) i have an access to preview data. But it's a development system without business data so i can't test my Business Object.

Does anyone know solution that will help me to get an access to business data to test my custom inbound API based on BO ? Frankly, i am run out of concepts what i can do more... 

Best regards, AN

entry.title: Joule In Eclipse
entry.content:
Hi ,

I am Trying to use Joule in My latest eclipse

Version: 2025-03 (4.35.0)

Build id: 20250306-0812 )

But it showing this error 

I want detail setup guide how can i use joule for my all ABAP developments ( I have a S-User id ) .

Q1)  What i need to Subscribe in My SAP BTP account  and how to get it stated?

Q2) Do i need any license's ?

Q3) How much of it is paid and free?

Regards,

Basant Joshi

entry.title: Choose the incorrect information about the exception hierarchy in ABAP.
entry.content:
In this question, I doesn't know the answer? Anyone help me?
(Choose 1 answer)
Choose the incorrect information about the exception hierarchy in ABAP.
A. Every exception class offers a range of standard methods and attributes are derived from the subclass CX_ROOT.
B. All exception classes must be derived from one of the classes CX_STATIC_CHECK,CX_DYNAMIC_CHECK or CX_NO_CHECK.
C. The classes CX_STATIC_CHECK, CX_DYNAMIC_CHECK, CX_NO_CHECK are subclasses of superclass CX_ROOT.
D. None of the others.

entry.title: Connection from BTP ABAP System to PostgreSQL DB via ODBC
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Are we able to connect Postgresql db from BTP ABAP system via ODBC ? 

Thanks a lot.

Best Regards,

Muthu

entry.title: USE OF AI IN ECLIPSE
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to use AI in eclipse. My requirement is like this,

I want to auto generate CDS, Database tables , domain , data elements, directly in my package using the Prompt, now we have AI options like 

1)  Joule 

But Joule serves primarily as an assistant to enhance productivity. It offers AI-based capabilities that help in understanding complex development objects, generating code snippets, and providing interactive support through a chat interface.

for joule i have used this blog.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/joule-speaks-abap/ba-p/14018226

2) i have read this post also, which may be the possible way to achieve this functionality

I have gone through this post but its in beta and beta features are enabled in my cockpit, and still i am not able to see that option in my eclipse.  

teched2024-AD180/exercises/ex01/README.md at main · SAP-samples/teched2024-AD180 · GitHub

Can any one suggest me a solution, it will be helpful 

Thanks,

Basant

entry.title: Graduate Student Programs for SAP Certification - Seeking Advice
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm currently pursuing my Master's in Information Systems and have about 5 years of experience as an ABAP Developer.

As I continue my academic journey, I'm looking to enhance my credentials with the SAP Certified Associate - Back-End Developer - ABAP Cloud  and SAP Fiori Application Developer certification. I'm specifically interested in:

  • Are there any special programs or discounts available for graduate students pursuing SAP certifications
  • Does SAP offer any university alliance programs that provide certification opportunities?
  • Has anyone here completed this certification while being a student? If so, what was your experience like?
  • Any recommendations on the best preparation resources for this certification that are budget-friendly for students?
  • Are there any mentorship programs available for students aiming to specialize in SAP development?

Additionally, if there are any specific grants, scholarships, or corporate sponsorship programs that support SAP certification for graduate students, I'd appreciate that information as well.

I believe this certification would strengthen my professional credentials and prior industry experience, making me more competitive in the job market as I advance my career in SAP development.

Thank you in advance for your insights and advice!

Best regards,
Kavyasri

entry.title: How to find all CDS views or tables involved in final CDS view
entry.content:
Hello,

How to find all CDS views or tables involved in final CDS view.

Here Where-used List will not useful. It gives final CDS where it was used.

I need all source CDS views or tables involved in final CDS view.

Regards,

Vasu

entry.title: Hide columns in Overall Release of Purchase Requisitions screen via My Inbox app
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I would like to seek for advice on how to hide a column in the Overall Release of Purchase Requisitions screen in My Inbox app. I am able to add 4 columns (Asset Number, Internal Number, GL Account and Cost Center) by using CDS View extension. After adding the columns, I was requested to hide one column (Connected Material) as the table now looks squished and that particular column is not in use. However, I am unable to use CDS Metadata extension because there is no annotation to allow metadata extension in the CDS C_PurRequisitionItemFs. Is there any way I could hide the column? Any advice would be appreciated. Thank you!

entry.title: In CDS view group by clause not aggregating all records
entry.content:
Hello,

I have CDS view with Group by clause and result expecting one record but its giving three records.

I have used all fields in group by clause, The records are not aggregating as single record.

Any annotation require to aggregate or something missing in select statement?

Regards,

Vasu

entry.title: Processing exception during a "Render" operation. .ProcessingException: IO error detected while open
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

 I am working on adobe form and I am facing system error  as show below.

 


 I have done all the three tests of ADS
FP_TEST_00
FP_CHECK_DESTINATION_SERVICE
FP_PDF_TEST_00

All the three reports are giving the results as expected .

Earlier I did not understand what the system error is about. After going through few threads I could able to trace from where the error is coming and what the error is about.

CREATE_OUTPUT_CURRENT_FORM is the subroutine where I could able to capture the error.

The following is the error :

Processing exception during a "Render" operation. Request start time: Tue Apr 08 14:40:29 IST 2025 com.adobe.ProcessingException: com.adobe.ProcessingException: IO error detected while opening DEST connection: http://100.64.109.143:8080/sap/bc/fp/form/layout/ZMATERIAL_EXP_QA_CHECK2.XDP?fp-language=EN&fp-mlayout-sup=X&fp-cacheinfo=2025-04-07T05:34:18Z$5ef403a9-256d-4ee3-aaef-7f7832056b50$0$en$v1.0$ Exception Stack Trace: com.adobe.

NOTE : I am getting this error only in quality system . It is working fine in Development system.
Can you please let me know what is the cause of this system error and how to fix it. ?


I could able to find one post where the issue is the same as above and solution was offered to open backend system port connection from portal side. The thread is the below one. It is not clear to how to do it.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/problem-trying-read-data-from-destination/qaq-p/4290340

entry.title: Unable to read repository at https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/latest/content.xml.xz.
entry.content:
When we try to install ADT on eclipse platform we are getting this error  :-
Unable to read repository at https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/latest/content.xml.xz.
Unable to read repository at https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/latest/content.xml.xz.
PKIX path building failed: sun.security.provider.certpath.SunCertPathBuilderException: unable to find valid certification path to requested target
how to resolve it?

entry.title: Wrong approval flow in wim in ecc
entry.content:
1. Change the acceptance flow of FOs (2 way match) that are generated from Zycus to SAP (document type YEC), so that the receipt in SAP IM invoice is done by the PR creator, not Cost Center owner.

 

Issue is when generate FO (2 way match) orders in Zycus and they go to SAP, where an Invoice is received in SAP IM. The current approval path for FO orders with WBS decrement go to Cost Center owner to accept invoice in SAP IM, but  it should go to PR creator from order.

 

How can we archive this in logically

entry.title: BTP Trial account - prompted for username and pwd for ABAP env from BTP and from Eclipse
entry.content:
I have created (and deleted and re-created, and deleted and re-created in a new sub account) an ABAP environment on SAP BTP trial version.  This has been fine previously without issue.  A few weeks back I made some Fiori apps and did some auth relevant stuff.  Since then whenever I launch the ABAP env from BTP (by clicking the below) or try and connect via Eclipse browser logon (using incognito window too), I get prompted for a username and password - so annoying as my BTP name and pwd does not work.  I have tried everything I can think of, removed cookies and cache, used different browsers, deleted and recreated ABAP env using booster etc.  Nothing has worked.

Any ideas what it could be?  trust issues?  Any help much appreciated.

entry.title: Not able to create new vendor number with reference vendor number through program
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am facing the following issue while trying to create a vendor number using a reference vendor number via custom program (BP Transaction).

I used the method by passing data through the structure ls_data. Inside ls_data, I have included the vendor address data. However, I am still encountering the same error messages.

It seems like the data may not be correctly passed into the deep structure. Could you please advise on how to properly pass data in a deep structure for this scenario?

Any guidance or examples would be greatly appreciated.
